simplified_strategy.simplified_model_overview: Model is based on finding Institutional Absorption OR strong Initiative Big Trades, and trading the Second Drive.
simplified_strategy.simplified_entry_trigger: Enter at MARKET immediately when Big Trades hit a wall and are absorbed, OR when strong Initiative Big Trades are rewarded by price acceptance. Do not wait for candle close.
simplified_strategy.simplified_stop_exact: Stop Loss must be 2-3 ticks behind the structural wall (the Big Trade absorption cluster). Max 120 ticks.
simplified_strategy.simplified_ivb_formation: IVB is the first 1 hour of trading. Breakout of IVB sets the day's trend.
simplified_strategy.simplified_second_drive_exact: Wait for the first drive to stall (pullback), and enter on the second drive resuming the trend.
simplified_strategy.simplified_no_trade_top3: Do not trade inside the IB on a balance day. Do not trade if volume < 300.
simplified_strategy.ib_breakout_rules: Valid breakout requires a candle close outside the Initial Balance.
simplified_strategy.ibob_overview: Initial Balance is the first 60 mins. Breakouts define the session bias.
simplified_strategy.ibob_invalidation: If price closes back inside the IB after a breakout, it is a failed auction (reversal).
simplified_strategy.ibob_stop_target: Stop behind the breakout candle or structure. Target is 1.5x to 2x the IB extension.
simplified_strategy.ib_bias: Bias follows the direction of the IB breakout.

knowledge_by_topic.squeeze_definition: A squeeze occurs when traders are trapped against a structural wall, forcing them to cover.
knowledge_by_topic.squeeze_entry_trigger: Enter when the trapped side shows exhaustion (delta divergence).
knowledge_by_topic.simplified_day_type_quick: Trend Day: one-sided. Balance Day: rotates around POC.
knowledge_by_topic.aplus_setup: Trend day + pullback to VWAP/POC + absorption = A+ setup.
knowledge_by_topic.punches_to_wall: Look for 3+ Big Trades hitting the same level and failing to break it.
knowledge_by_topic.punch_in_wall_trend_continuation: CRITICAL: On TREND days (trend_up or trend_down) or IMBALANCE sessions, 'Punches to the Wall' are NOT reversal signals — they are CONTINUATION signals. TREND_UP + strong negative delta at highs = sellers absorbed by institutional buyers. Next 1-3 candles: price stabilizes → LONG continuation entry. TREND_DOWN + strong positive delta at lows = buyers absorbed by institutional sellers. Next 1-3 candles: price stabilizes → SHORT continuation entry. NEVER call a punch at the highs a short signal on a trend_up day. It is a reload zone for longs.
knowledge_by_topic.big_trades_filter: Big trades must be >30 contracts to matter.
knowledge_by_topic.coherence_of_information: Ensure M5 trend, M1 delta, and Bookmap liquidity align.
knowledge_by_topic.counter_trend_rules: Counter trend requires a hard structural stop and clear absorption of the dominant trend.
knowledge_by_topic.entry_mechanics: Market order exactly at the moment of absorption or initiative acceptance.
knowledge_by_topic.initiative_vs_absorption: While Institutional Absorption (passive limit orders stopping price) is a premium A+ setup, you MUST ALSO trade INITIATIVE setups. If you see strong INITIATIVE Big Trades (aggressive market orders pushing price) and the auction rewards them (price accepts the new level), enter in the direction of the initiative. Protect your Stop Loss behind the origin of those initiative Big Trades.
